display.purpose: Spicy Rice. Page headers and book cover titles only — one to three words.

body.purpose: Nunito. UI chrome, nav, forms, dialogs.

label.purpose: Nunito, uppercase, tracked-widest. Button labels, pills, micro-copy.

content.purpose: Newsreader. Book page text, justified, with a drop cap on the lead paragraph.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus and 'More' panels attached to the nav bar.

shadows.name: mini-book-stack
shadows.purpose: The 3D mini-book card: outer glow, inner highlight, shelf shadow, spine shading.

shadows.name: reading-panel-glass
shadows.purpose: Frosted-glass reading panel, paired with backdrop-filter: blur(20px).

motion.name: ease-bulge
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for .btn-bulge hover/press transforms. No bounce/elastic.

motion.name: duration-bulge
motion.purpose: Standard transform/box-shadow/filter duration for button presses.

motion.name: duration-bulge-active
motion.purpose: Faster settle on active/press for snappier feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Tactile bulge button — default theme surface, Marquee Yellow label, scales up on hover and down on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 24px; background-color: #2563eb; color: #fef08a; border: 1px solid #2563eb; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Nunito, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), background-color 150ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.05) translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); background-color: #b91c1c; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95) translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); transition-duration: 100ms; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fef08a; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary, .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: none; box-shadow: none; } }

components.name: Mini-Book Card
components.description: Signature 3D book cover: spine, shelf-shadow stack, radial highlight, Spicy Rice title over a dark scrim.
components.html: A Day at the Beach
components.css: .ds-card-book { position: relative; display: block; aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; width: 220px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #374151, #111827); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), inset 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset -3px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transition: opacity 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-card-book:hover { opacity: 0.85; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), inset 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset -3px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0 0 0 4px rgba(209,213,219,0.5); } .ds-card-book__scrim { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25); } .ds-card-book__title { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 12px; margin: 0; font-family: 'Spicy Rice', cursive; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #ffffff; text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card-book__spine { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 18px; background: linear-gradient(to left, #1f2937, #374151, #1f2937); box-shadow: inset 3px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), inset -2px 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.15), -2px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-left: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }

components.name: Marquee Nav Bar
components.description: Sticky rainbow light-bar nav: Spicy Rice logo/active link, Marquee Yellow active state.
components.html:
Shudderfly
ALLCollagesGames
components.css: .ds-nav-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #ef4444, #f97316, #eab308, #22c55e, #3b82f6, #a855f7); border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; } .ds-nav-bar__logo { font-family: 'Spicy Rice', cursive; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #fef08a; } .ds-nav-bar__link { font-family: 'Spicy Rice', cursive; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 4px; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-bar__link:hover, .ds-nav-bar__link--active { color: #fef08a; border-color: #fef08a; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Admin dashboard tile: icon, label, value on a Paper White surface with an ambient shadow.
components.html:
Total Books
128
components.css: .ds-card-stat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-card-stat__icon { color: #9ca3af; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-stat__label { font-family: Nunito, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #6b7280; } .ds-card-stat__value { font-family: Nunito, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; }

components.name: Confirm Modal
components.description: Centered dialog on a dimmed backdrop, Paper White surface with a hero shadow.
components.html: Are you sure you want to remove this page?
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 32px; background: rgba(107,114,128,0.75); border-radius: 8px; } .ds-modal { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 24px; } .ds-modal__body { font-family: Nunito, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #111827; }

components.name: Reading Panel
components.description: Frosted-glass storybook reading panel with a Newsreader drop cap on the lead paragraph.
components.html: Once upon a time, on a sunny afternoon, the whole family piled into the car for an adventure none of us would forget.
components.css: .ds-reading-panel { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 2rem; max-width: 800px; } .ds-reading-panel__lead { font-family: Newsreader, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); margin: 0; } .ds-reading-panel__lead::first-letter { font-size: 2.5em; float: left; line-height: 0.9; margin: 0.05em 0.08em 0.02em 0; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.98); text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }

narrative.overview:
Shudderfly's stage is a charcoal-navy backdrop (Stage Night, #111827) lit by a single spotlight color — Marquee Yellow — and framed top and bottom by a hand-painted rainbow light bar. Page titles, book covers, and primary nav labels are set in Spicy Rice, the chunky hand-lettered typeface of a backyard movie-night marquee. Family memories sit on this stage like keepsakes on a shelf: 3D "mini-book" covers with spines, shelf shadows, and shelf-light highlights, and a frosted-glass reading panel where Newsreader serif text and a dropped first letter turn the page into a storybook.

Four times a year the marquee changes its bulbs for the season — Christmas, Halloween, Fireworks — repainting the rainbow bar, the spotlight color, and adding seasonal effects (falling snow, fireworks bursts) without rebuilding the stage itself. The marquee never goes quiet, and it never goes corporate: this system explicitly rejects public-feed mechanics (infinite scroll, like counters, social proof), generic gray SaaS dashboard chrome, and "generic AI UI" tropes — cream/sand backgrounds, gradient text, tracked-uppercase eyebrow labels, numbered section scaffolds — per PRODUCT.md's anti-references.
keyCharacteristics: Dark stage by default (Stage Night #111827), lit by a single Marquee Yellow accent
A rainbow gradient light bar bookends every page — nav at top, footer at bottom — and nowhere else
Spicy Rice display type for titles and labels only — never body copy
3D "mini-book" covers (spine, shelf shadow, radial highlight) as the primary content card
A frosted-glass reading panel with Newsreader serif text and a classic drop cap
Tactile .btn-bulge buttons — physical, pressable, ease-out only, no bounce
Four seasonal "costume changes" via data-theme (default, christmas, halloween, fireworks) that repaint the marquee without changing its structure

rules.name: The Rainbow Light-Bar Rule
rules.body: The bg-rainbow gradient (red → orange → yellow → green → blue → purple, re-themed per season) is reserved for exactly two places: the top nav and the footer. It is the marquee's string lights — used as a section background, button, or card anywhere else, it flattens into decoration and breaks the "two light bars frame the stage" read.

rules.name: The Halloween Reservation Rule
rules.body: Purple/violet (halloween-purple #6B2D8F, halloween-witch #4B0082, and Tailwind's purple-* scale) is reserved for the Halloween data-theme only. Using purple as a default-theme accent — gradients, headings, hover states — both steals Halloween's seasonal signal and is the single most recognizable AI-palette tell.

rules.name: The One Marquee Font Rule
rules.body: Spicy Rice appears only in headings, titles, and the primary nav label — never in body copy, buttons, or dense UI text. At length its hand-lettered density becomes illegible; one to three words at a time only.

rules.name: The Stage Light Rule
rules.body: Shadows fall as if lit from above by the marquee — tight, dark shadows under flat UI (cards, dropdowns, stat tiles); softer, wider glows around "performance" elements (book covers, active/pressed buttons, the reading panel).

dos: Do keep the stage dark (Stage Night #111827) by default; Paper White is reserved for floating panels — dropdowns, modals, admin cards — never the page background.
Do use Spicy Rice only for short titles and labels (one to three words); everything else is Nunito (UI) or Newsreader (reading content).
Do apply .btn-bulge to every new pressable element — it's the app's tactile signature across the family's mixed ages.
Do keep the bg-rainbow gradient confined to the nav and footer bars (The Rainbow Light-Bar Rule).
Do give every animation — bulge, snow, fireworks, reveals — a prefers-reduced-motion alternative, per PRODUCT.md's accessibility principles.
Do keep tap targets large (min 44px / min-h-11) — the audience spans young kids to adults.
donts: Don't use cream/sand/parchment near-white backgrounds. Per PRODUCT.md this reads as generic AI UI and breaks the dark-stage identity.
Don't use gradient text, tracked-uppercase "eyebrow" labels above sections, or numbered 01/02/03 section scaffolds — explicit PRODUCT.md anti-references.

Don't introduce purple/violet (purple-400, purple-600, from-purple-* gradients) outside the Halloween theme (The Halloween Reservation Rule) — it's both seasonally reserved and the most recognizable AI-palette tell.
Don't animate width, height, padding, or margin for transitions — use transform/opacity, or grid-template-rows for height changes.
Don't build infinite-scroll feeds, like/heart counters, or other social-proof/engagement mechanics — Shudderfly is memory-first, not engagement-first (PRODUCT.md).
Don't let admin/dashboard surfaces collapse into generic gray SaaS chrome — even the Admin dashboard keeps the marquee's playful voice (StatCards, theme accents, Spicy Rice headers).
Don't stack nested cards. The mini-book and reading panel earn their depth; a card inside a card inside a card does not.
